channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: A new European regulator will keep an eye on cloud licensing issues
item.description: CISPE has launched a new and independent regulator to keep tabs on competition in the European cloud market.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: La IA generativa redefine la educación secundaria; así es GenAI4ED
item.description: El pasado mes de octubre arrancaba el proyecto GenAI4ED, una iniciativa internacional financiada a cargo de Horizonte Europa que cuenta con la participación de IMDEA Networks.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Meta creates ‘Business AI’ group led by ex-Salesforce AI CEO Clara Shih
item.description: Meta has hired the former CEO of Salesforce AI, Clara Shih, to lead a new “Business AI” group. Salesforce has still not publicly acknowledged Shih’s departure, but it will be hard to ignore now that she’s announced her new role on her LinkedIn profile.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: CIO100 ASEAN Awards 2024: Recognizing Southeast Asia's Top Tech Leaders
item.description: CIO100 ASEAN Awards 2024: Celebrating innovation and leadership in technology across Southeast Asia and Hong Kong.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Microsoft unveils imaging APIs for Windows Copilot Runtime
item.description: Microsoft’s Windows Copilot Runtime, which allows developers to integrate AI capabilities into Windows, is being fitted with AI-backed APIs for image processing. It will also gain access to Phi 3.5 Silica, a custom-built generative AI model for Copilot+ PCs.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Amazon and SpaceX are challenging the NLRB’s constitutionality in federal court
item.description: Attorneys for Amazon and Elon Musk’s SpaceX argued in a federal appeals court Monday that the National Labor Relations Board’s structure is unconstitutional, advancing a legal fight that may last into the Trump administration where Musk is expected to oversee bureaucratic cost-cutting.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: The Impactful AI Tools Revolutionizing Workflows
item.description: Discover how artificial intelligence is transforming business processes, customer support, video meetings, and language translation. Learn about the innovative tools being used by companies like aiOla, Antithesis, Intercom, Logitech, Sorenson, and Zip to improve efficiency and effectiveness.
item.dc:creator: Harry McCracken, Fast Company

item.title: The 5 next big things in commerce technology for 2024
item.description: Years after e-commerce rose to unprecedented prominence during the pandemic, virtually every aspect of sales infrastructure, channel, and experience has been targeted by innovation.
item.dc:creator: Ross Rubin, Fast Company

item.title: The 5 next big things in AR, VR, spatial computing, and multiverse for 2024
item.description: No, the Apple Vision Pro didn’t prove to be the iPhone of AR, but augmented and virtual experiences got a fresh jolt of energy in 2024 all the same.
item.dc:creator: Mark Wilson, Fast Company

item.title: Microsoft pitches AI 'agents' that can perform tasks on their own at Ignite 2024
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella told customers at a conference in Chicago on Tuesday that the company is teaching a new set of artificial intelligence tools how to "act on our behalf across our work and life.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 1 in 5 get news from social media influencers: Pew poll
item.description: About 1 in 5 Americans say they get their news from social media influencers, according to a new poll from the Pew Research Center. Of the 21 percent of adults who said they get their news from influencers on social media, the split was roughly even across parties.
item.dc:creator: Joanne Haner, The Hill

item.title: For November, Patch Tuesday includes three Windows zero-day fixes
item.description: Microsoft’s November Patch Tuesday release addresses 89 vulnerabilities in Windows, SQL Server, .NET and Microsoft Office — and three zero-day vulnerabilities (CVE-2024-43451, CVE-2024-49019 and CVE-2024-49039) that mean a patch now recommendation for Windows platforms.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: In Cyprus, Ukrainians learn how to dispose of landmines that kill and maim hundreds
item.description: NICOSIA, Cyprus (AP) — In a Cypriot National Guard camp, Ukrainians are being trained on how to identify, locate and dispose of landmines and other unexploded munitions that litter huge swaths of their country, killing and maiming hundreds of people, including children.
item.dc:creator: MENELAOS HADJICOSTIS, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Elon Musk says he and Trump have 'mandate to delete' regulations. Ethics laws could limit Musk role
item.description: In picking billionaire Elon Musk to be “our cost cutter” for the U.S. government, President-elect Donald Trump won't be the first American president to empower a business tycoon to look for ways to dramatically cut federal regulations. President Ronald Reagan tapped J.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and TOM KRISHER, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: AI developers discover 'Donald Trump neuron', expert says
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
